feedback: Plan authored covering all 15 TDD tasks (T-01..T-15) expanded to 17 plan tasks (T-05 and T-12 split, T-15 added for integration tests) with dependency graph, 4 parallel tracks, buffered effort (47.4h total, ~30.6h critical path buffered, ~25h wall-clock with 2 executors), risk register (12 items, 1 high — live-host availability), and full TDD-to-task traceability. Every FR-*, ADR, and TDD design section maps to at least one task. No circular dependencies; no TDD revision required.

artifacts.title: Implementation Plan: REQ-000055 — Live Homelab End-to-End Enablement
